    Class and Description
    NetEditorContentType
    Type of the content of a NGR.
  • Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.io used by org.arakhne.neteditor.io 
    Class and Description
    AbstractVectorialExporterGraphics2D
    Abstract implementation of a VectorGraphics2D dedicated to vector exporters.
    FileCollection
    Collection of files with a main file.
    NetEditorContentType
    Type of the content of a NGR.
    NetEditorReader
    This interface represents a reader of NetEditor files.
    NetEditorWriter
    This interface represents a writer of NetEditor files.
    VectorialExporter
    This interface represents exporters into vectorial formats such as xfig...
    VectorialPictureFileType
    Type of vectorial pictures supported by this file filter.
